zh.Huntspill, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特亨斯皮爾
zh.Brampton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文布勞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cogan於1348年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布勞頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Cogan49歲，母親Lady Mary de Montagu35歲。他於1362年1月11日與Lady Isabel Loring在英國戴文巴普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年7月22日在他的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴普頓。

zh-hans.Huntspill, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特亨斯皮爾
zh-hans.Brampton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文布勞頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cogan于1348年出生在英国英格兰戴文布勞頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Cogan49岁，母亲Lady Mary de Montagu35岁。他于1362年1月11日与Lady Isabel Loring在英国戴文巴普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年7月22日在他的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国戴文巴普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish (from Ukraine) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

Irish and Welsh (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cogan near Cardiff, which may have been named with a Welsh word meaning ‘bowl, depression’. In 1166 Milo de Cogan, held two fees near Penarth (Glamorganshire) of William earl of Gloucester. Members of this Norman family probably account for the name's appearance in 13th-century Berwickshire. By this time the family was also present in Ireland, associated with counties Limerick and Cork. It may have been the Irish branch that later brought the name to southwest Scotland.

variants.name: Cogen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Dorith.  German Erwin.

variants.name: Cohen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Isadore, Emanuel, Moshe, Shlomo, Myer, Avi, Yehuda, Chaim.
Jewish: from Hebrew kohen ‘priest’. Priests are traditionally regarded as members of a hereditary caste descended from Aaron, brother of Moses. See also Kaplan .
Irish (Galway and Sligo): variant of   Coyne  .

variants.name: Coggins
meanings: English: variant of Cogan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Coggan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Conal, Seamus.  Jewish Hyman.
Americanized form of Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cogan was born in 1348, in Braunton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Cogan, was 49 and his mother, Lady Mary de Montagu, was 35. He married Lady Isabel Loring on 11 January 1362, in Bampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 July 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Bampton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cogan est né en 1348, à Braunton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Cogan, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary de Montagu, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Loring le 11 janvier 1362, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cogan 1348 in Braunton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Cogan 49 und seine Mutter Lady Mary de Montagu 35. Er hat am 11. Januar 1362 in Bampton, Devon, England Lady Isabel Loring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1382 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bampton, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cogan è nato il nel 1348 nel Braunton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Cogan, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary de Montagu, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Loring il 11 gennaio 1362, nel Bampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 luglio 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Bampton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Coganが1348年にイギリスイギリスデボンブラウントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Coganは49歳，母Lady Mary de Montaguは35歳であった。1362年1月11日にイギリスデボンバンプトンでLady Isabel Loringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年7月22日に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Cogan(이)가 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브라운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Cogan(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary de Montagu(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1362년 1월 11일 영국 데폰 바프턴에서 Lady Isabel Loring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 7월 22일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cogan nasceu em 1348, em Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Cogan, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary de Montagu, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Loring em 11 de janeiro de 1362, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cogan родился в 1348 г. в местности браунтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Cogan было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary de Montagu, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Loring 11 января 1362 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 июля 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности бамптон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cogan nació en 1348, en Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Cogan, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Lady Mary de Montagu, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Loring el 11 de enero de 1362, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de julio de 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra.
